name: gmail-cleaner-buddy-app
description: Gmail Cleaner Buddy — aplicativo Android nativo (Capacitor) com OAuth2 PKCE e Gmail API

scripts.sync: npm run typecheck && npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run sync && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug

author: Marlon Bastida
